title: Illuminated
description: Illuminate your world with a flashlight!
body:
# Illuminated



![mod banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LambdAurora/Illuminated/26.1/assets/mod_banner.png)

This mod adds various light sources demonstrating the power of the [LambDynamicLights] API, while still adding some really cool features to the game.

You need to install LambDynamicLights ([Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)) along with this mod.

## 🎥 Trailer


<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xew0s2TwZ84?start=161" width="560" height="315" allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" style="border: 3px solid #00ffcc; border-radius: 10px;"></iframe>

## ✅ Features

### 🔦 Flashlight

A flashlight, making a light shape normally impossible in Minecraft. Ideal for horror themed events, maps or packs.

![lighting up a creaking](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LambdAurora/Illuminated/26.1/assets/flashlight_demo.png)

It can be crafted as so:

![crafting recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LambdAurora/Illuminated/26.1/assets/flashlight_recipe.png)

The flashlight can be toggled on and off by right-clicking.

## 📖 I want to use this API as well!

[Check out this in-depth documentation for LambDynamicLights](https://lambdaurora.dev/projects/lambdynamiclights/docs/v4/).
